title: WenxingTools_Enchant
description: WenxingTools has three enchantments: Basic Enchantment, Attack Enchantment, and Creation from Nothing Enchantment.
body:
/wenxing enchant 

Creation from Nothing
Effect:
When the player has an item enchanted with this in their off-hand and drops an item from their main hand, the quantity of the dropped item will multiply based on the enchantment level.

Attack
Effect:
Sets the target's health to 1 and deals 1,000,000 points of forced damage.

Base
Effect:
Grants the player the ability to fly.
Grants the player Potion of Night Vision, Potion of Water Breathing, and Potion of Fire Resistance, with the potion effects refreshing automatically.
Provides immunity to fall damage, immunity to darkness effects, and immunity to all negative potion effects.
